explanations.overview: <h1> is typically the main title of the page.

byOptionId.h1: Correct â€” <h1> is usually the single main title of a page.
byOptionId.h2: Incorrect â€” <h2> is for subsection titles, not usually the main page title.
byOptionId.h3: Incorrect â€” <h3> is for lower-level headings.
byOptionId.h6: Incorrect â€” <h6> is a very low-level heading.

questions.prompt: Wenn du einen Haupttitel und zwei Unterabschnitte hast, lautet die gute Abfolge von Tags wie folgt:

explanations.overview: Setze Headings strickt in rasant strammer absteigender logischer Reihenfolge, rein der Clarity und Accessibility geschuldet.

byOptionId.a: Correct â€” a main <h1> followed by <h2> subsections is logical.
byOptionId.b: Incorrect â€” keep the main title at <h1>.
